subject: A hammerhead-shark-headed humanoid leaping mid-air toward a rusted mechanical vehicle crewed by two green goblins, against a backdrop of explosive flame and racing debris
description: A muscular humanoid figure with a hammerhead-shark head, jaws agape with rows of sharp teeth, launches itself through the air toward a battered metal vehicle. The vehicle is steered by a green-skinned goblin gripping a metal wheel, with a second goblin perched on a mounted barrel atop the chassis, mouth open in alarm. A roaring orange-yellow explosion erupts behind the shark figure, throwing smoke and shrapnel across the scene. In the upper-left distance, another silhouetted vehicle and rider are visible amid the chaos. The composition is a kinetic action snapshot of a hostile vehicle boarding mid-race.
foreground: shark-headed humanoid mid-leap, goblin-crewed vehicle with steering wheel and barrel
background: orange explosion with smoke, debris, distant secondary vehicle and rider
emotion: the shark figure is aggressive and predatory mid-lunge; the goblins are panicked and wide-eyed; overall vibe is frantic violent intrusion
